name: dashboard-profiles
description: Full-page screenshot sweep for all dashboard profiles. Run via scripts/capture.ps1 or: npx tsx C:/Github/vid-scroll/src/cli.ts --breakpoints configs/breakpoints.json --local --output docs/screenshots

notes.local: Use --local flag (or scripts/capture.ps1 -Local) to capture from file:// — no server needed.
notes.collapseVariants: Produces both expanded and collapsed variants per page × breakpoint.
notes.webp: Requires ffmpeg on PATH. Install: winget install Gyan.FFmpeg
